_instructions: Copy this file to secrets.json and fill in real values. secrets.json is gitignored and must never be committed.
_GOOGLE_SERVER_CLIENT_ID_where: console.cloud.google.com → Your Project → APIs & Services → Credentials → OAuth 2.0 Client IDs → Web client (auto created by Google Service) → Client ID
_NOTE_facebook: Facebook App ID and Client Token go in frontend/android/app/src/main/res/values/strings.xml (not here). Get them from developers.facebook.com → Your App → Settings → Basic (App ID) and Settings → Advanced (Client Token).
